evals.name: slide-distillation-paper
evals.prompt: Forging these notes into a 3-page Why.J Slide DSL about 'Attention is All You Need'. Focus on the Transformer architecture logic.

evals.name: blog-distillation-incident
evals.prompt: Transform this raw incident report about a Redis timeout into a high-density 'Why.J Engineering' blog post. Strip all corporate speak.

evals.name: cli-revolution-presentation
evals.prompt: Distill the 'SaaS CLI Revolution' long-form article into a 6-slide Why.J Engineering Theater deck.
evals.expected_output: Must follow 00-06 sequence, absolute push-left, and O(1) text density.
